_researchNotes: Sparse 'message' style notification. The Knot Pro support distinguishes plain conversation messages ('Responding to a Lead from Messages on The Knot', vendorsupport.theknotpro.com) from quote-request leads; couples can message a vendor without filling every detail. Releventful's forwarding doc says only first name + email are guaranteed (their importer discards the email otherwise) - so this fixture omits phone, guest count and location. helpcenter.theknot.com ('How do I reply to message?') confirms vendor replies route to the couple's email address, i.e. the couple's reachable email appears in the notification. Date appears in long US prose form ('April 5, 2027') rather than 10/17/2026 style, a variant the Zapier shared zap ('the knot to HL', zapier.com/shared/copy-the-knot-to-hl-leadexcess-build) handles via date formatter steps. Sender uses the partner.theknot.com domain variant.
subject: Marcus sent you a message on The Knot
textBody:
Hi Demo DJ Co.,

Marcus Webb sent you a message on The Knot.

Wedding date: April 5, 2027

"Hey there - are you available for our wedding next spring? It's a small backyard thing, mostly open-format music. What would that run us?"

Reply to Marcus: marcus.webb88@example.com

Log in to your Knot account to view the full conversation.

The Knot Pro
